CC=clang CXX=clang++ CFLAGS_FOR_BUILD="-Os -std=gnu99 -march=armv8-a -fbracket-depth=1024" CXXFLAGS_FOR_BUILD="-Os -std=gnu++11 -march=armv8-a -fbracket-depth=1024" CFLAGS_FOR_TARGET="-Os -march=armv8-a" CXXFLAGS_FOR_TARGET="-Os -march=armv8-a" CPPFLAGS_FOR_TARGET="-I/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/include/aarch64-linux-android" LDFLAGS_FOR_TARGET="-Wl,-rpath,/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib" ../gcc-5.5.0/configure --prefix=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local --target=aarch64-linux-android --program-suffix=-5.5 --with-gmp=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --with-mpc=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --with-mpfr=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --with-gcc-major-version-only --with-system-zlib --disable-nls --enable-threads --disable-bootstrap --enable-multiarch --disable-multilib --disable-tls --with-arch=armv8-a --enable-default-pie --enable-link-mutex --enable-__cxa_atexit --with-long-double-128 --enable-gnu-indirect-function --enable-initfini-array --disable-sjlj-exceptions --enable-fix-cortex-a53-835769 --enable-fix-cortex-a53-843419 --enable-linker-build-id --with-linker-hash-style=gnu --with-boot-ldflags="-specs=/data/data/com.termux/files/home/sources/termux-packages/scripts/termux.spec -static-libstdc++ -static-libgcc" --with-sysroot=/data/data/com.termux/files --with-build-time-tools=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local/aarch64-linux-android/bin --with-local-prefix=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local --with-ld=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local/aarch64-linux-android/bin/ld --with-as=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local/aarch64-linux-android/bin/as --enable-languages=c,c++
